MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WEDNESDAY-JUNE-17-2009: Tamara Rosselli, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.; Arnold Walter Evje, counsel appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Jerome Schweich, limited scope attorney appearing for and with defendant Richard Underwood

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 34 Sixth Street, #614, San Francisco, California. JUNE-22-2009 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
